title: Portable Context Control Plane — ConflictResolutionTrace Entry
description: Internal object schema for a single conflictResolutionTrace[] entry produced by the Conflict Resolver. Full trace entries are emitted ONLY for components with actual conflicts (more than one input decision, or a conflict_include path). Components with a single unambiguous decision (no conflict) are recorded only in noConflictComponentIds[] — they do NOT produce full trace entries. Canonical owner: docs/06 §11.3.2, §11.6.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-3 (Batch C creation). No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. resolutionRule $refs enums.shared.schema.json#ResolutionRule. Canonical: docs/06 §11.3.2, §11.6. No-conflict components go in noConflictComponentIds only — NOT here.

componentId.description: The validated registry component ID for which this conflict resolution trace entry was produced. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

inputDecisionIds.description: IDs of all SelectionDecision records that were inputs to this conflict resolution (both winner and losers). Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

finalAction.description: The resolved action value that won from conflict resolution. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

finalPath.description: The resolved path value that won from conflict resolution. Must be consistent with finalAction. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

resolutionRule.description: The canonical priority rule that produced the winning decision. Must be a value from the ResolutionRule enum (docs/06 §11.3.1a). Any unrecognized value is a harness failure. 'no_conflict' must NOT appear in conflictResolutionTrace entries — no-conflict components are in noConflictComponentIds only. Future additions require an explicit cross-spec decision pass. Canonical: docs/06 §11.3.1a, §11.6.

not.$comment: no_conflict is only valid on ResolvedSelectionDecision for no-conflict components. It must never appear in a full conflictResolutionTrace entry — those are emitted only for components with actual conflicts.

action.description: The action from the losing decision.

path.description: The path from the losing decision.

defeatedBy.description: Coded reason why this decision was defeated (e.g., 'safety_hard_protection', 'runtime_unavailable_defer', 'history_malformed_fail_open'). Must not contain raw content.

losingDecisions.description: Array of true losing decisions. The winning decision does NOT appear in losingDecisions. Empty array is valid when all input decisions merged into a single winner with no distinct loser (e.g., Case 5 multiple includes merged). Canonical: docs/06 §11.6, §11.5 Case 5.

warningsEmitted.description: Array of warning codes emitted during this conflict resolution. Must include 'history_malformed_conflict' when resolutionRule is history_malformed_fail_open or when a history-malformed input was present even if Priority 1 preempted (hardProtected). Empty array if no warnings. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6, §11.5 Case 12.

resolvedAt.description: Monotonic step counter value at the time this conflict resolution entry was produced. Not wall-clock time. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

hadGateConvertedDecisions.description: Optional. true if one or more input decisions had actionChanged: true in their selectorTrace entry (injection gate converted the action before the Conflict Resolver received it). Present only when gate conversion was detected. Enables operators to see that the final include may reflect an original omit that was gate-converted. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6; F-20 resolved.

gateConvertedTraceRefs.description: Optional. Array of trace entry IDs (from SelectionDecision.traceRefs) for each gate-converted input decision. Present only when hadGateConvertedDecisions: true. The referenced selectorTrace entries carry originalCandidateAction and originalCandidatePath as the canonical pre-gate context. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6; F-20 resolved.

preGateActions.description: Optional. Array of originalCandidateAction values from gate-converted input decisions, in the same order as gateConvertedTraceRefs. Informational summary; selectorTrace is canonical. Present only when hadGateConvertedDecisions: true. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.

preGatePaths.description: Optional. Array of originalCandidatePath values from gate-converted input decisions, in the same order as gateConvertedTraceRefs. Informational summary; selectorTrace is canonical. Present only when hadGateConvertedDecisions: true. Canonical: docs/06 §11.6.
